description: Schema for a specific Artifact with a specific Snyk vulnerability

repo_name.description: Repo whose workflow built the Artifact with the vulnerability

git_commit.description: 40 character git commit whose workflow built the Artifact with the vulnerability

commit_url.description: The git commit URL whose workflow built the Artifact with the vulnerability

artifact_name.description: The name of the Artifact with the vulnerability

artifact_fingerprint.description: 64 character digest of the Artifact with the vulnerability

snyk_version.description: The version of Snyk that found the vulnerability, eg 1.1300.2

snyk_policy_url.description: The URL of the Snyk policy file in git_commit

snyk_full_id.description: The full identifier of the vulnerability, eg SNYK-ALPINE321-RUBY-14100871

snyk_short_id.description: The short identifier of the vulnerability, eg 14100871

snyk_severity.description: The severity of the vulnerability, eg high

snyk_ignore_expires.description: The date+time of the ignore-expiry in the Snyk policy file, for this vulnerability, if it exists

snyk_ignore_expires_ts.description: The timestamp of the ignore-expiry in the Snyk policy file, for this vulnerability, if it exists

snyk_ignore_expires_exists.description: Whether there is an ignore-expiry in the Snyk policy file for this vulnerability
